questions.label: Where will the server run?
questions.help: Local stdio for Claude Desktop/Code, or an HTTP server for Docker/systemd.

questions.label: Semantic Scholar API key
questions.help: Strongly recommended. Unauthenticated requests are rate-limited to ~1 req/s; authenticated requests get ~10 req/s. Get one at semanticscholar.org/product/api.

questions.label: Contact email
questions.help: Sent in the OpenAlex User-Agent header for polite-pool access. Also enables Unpaywall PDF lookups.

questions.label: Read-only mode
questions.help: When enabled, PDF download and conversion tools are hidden. Recommended for shared or untrusted deployments.

questions.label: Bearer token
questions.help: Static token for HTTP auth. Any non-empty string enables bearer auth. Browser-only — never included in shareable links.

questions.label: EPO OPS consumer key
questions.help: Required for patent search tools. Register at developers.epo.org.

questions.label: EPO OPS consumer secret
questions.help: Required alongside the consumer key for EPO OPS access.

questions.label: Docling URL
questions.help: Base URL of a running docling-serve instance (e.g. http://localhost:5001). Required for PDF conversion.

questions.label: VLM API URL
questions.help: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for formula/figure enrichment during PDF conversion.

questions.label: VLM API key
questions.help: API key for the VLM endpoint.

questions.label: VLM model
questions.help: Model name used with the VLM endpoint.

questions.label: Google Books API key
questions.help: Optional. Unlocks higher rate limits for the Google Books enricher. Without it, the enricher works at 1000 requests/day.

questions.label: Cache directory
questions.help: Path for the SQLite database and downloaded PDFs.

questions.label: Rich logging
questions.help: Disable for plain/JSON output suitable for log aggregators (Loki, Datadog, Splunk).
